name: LLMTrace
content:
""" title: LLMTrace author: Johannes Faber website: https://FAI-Solutions.github.io open-webui_extension_hub: https://github.com/FAI-Solutions/open-webui-extensions openwebui_id: 8b79ffd1-640d-4b43-b816-cc0071eb4e3b description: Visualizes the full LLM workflow step-by-step. Tracks model info, parameters, feature flags, tool calls, reasoning blocks, response quality, real-time streaming stats, and timing. Appends a compact diagnostic panel to every assistant message with optional inline timeline and interactive dashboard. required_open_webui_version: 0.9.0 version: 1.0 """ from pydantic import BaseModel, Field from typing import Optional import time import re import json import hashlib import threading import html as html_mod import logging import copy import base64 import traceback log = logging.getLogger("llmtrace") ### CONSTANTS _VERSION = "1.0" _SKIP_TASKS = frozenset( { "title_generation", "tags_generation", "emoji_generation", "query_generation", "autocomplete_generation", "function_calling", "moa_response_generation", "follow_up_generation", } ) # Reasoning tags — all known variants (v0.9 open webui) _REASONING_OPEN_TAGS = [ "", "", "", "", "", "", "<|begin_of_thought|>", ] _REASONING_CLOSE_TAGS = [ "", "", "", "", "", "", "<|end_of_thought|>", ] _REASONING_OPEN_RE = re.compile( "|".join(re.escape(t) for t in _REASONING_OPEN_TAGS), re.IGNORECASE ) _REASONING_CLOSE_RE = re.compile( "|".join(re.escape(t) for t in _REASONING_CLOSE_TAGS), re.IGNORECASE ) # Builtin tool registry _BUILTIN_TOOLS_BY_CATEGORY = { "time": {"get_current_timestamp", "calculate_timestamp"}, "knowledge": { "list_knowledge", "search_knowledge_files", "query_knowledge_files", "view_file", "view_knowledge_file", "list_knowledge_bases", "search_knowledge_bases", "query_knowledge_bases", }, "notes": {"search_notes", "view_note", "write_note", "replace_note_content"}, "memory": { "search_memories", "add_memory", "replace_memory_content", "delete_memory", "list_memories", }, "web": {"search_web", "fetch_url"}, "image": {"generate_image", "edit_image"}, "code": {"execute_code"}, "chats": {"search_chats", "view_chat"}, "channels": { "search_channels", "search_channel_messages", "view_channel_thread", "view_channel_message", }, "skills": {"view_skill"}, } _ALL_BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES = frozenset( n for ns in _BUILTIN_TOOLS_BY_CATEGORY.values() for n in ns ) _TERMINAL_TOOL_NAMES = frozenset( { "run_command", "list_files", "read_file", "write_file", "display_file", "replace_file_content", "grep_search", "glob_search", } ) _PANEL_START = "\u200b\u200c\u200b" # ZWS + ZWNJ + ZWS _PANEL_END = "\u200c\u200b\u200c" # ZWNJ + ZWS + ZWNJ _STATUS_THROTTLE_SECS = 0.65 _MAX_TIMELINE = 500 _DASHBOARD_MODES = frozenset({"panel", "panel+embed", "panel+tab", "all"}) ### PER-REQUEST STATE STORE class _StateStore: __slots__ = ("_data", "_lock", "_key_locks", "_max_age", "_max_keys") def __init__(self, max_age: float = 300.0, max_keys: int = 150): self._data: dict = {} self._lock = threading.Lock() self._key_locks: dict = {} self._max_age = max_age self._max_keys = max_keys def _evict_locked(self): now = time.time() stale = [ k for k, v in self._data.items() if now - v.get("_meta", {}).get("created_at", now) > self._max_age ] for k in stale: del self._data[k] self._key_locks.pop(k, None) if len(self._data) > self._max_keys: by_age = sorted( self._data, key=lambda k: self._data[k].get("_meta", {}).get("created_at", 0), ) for k in by_age[: len(self._data) - self._max_keys]: del self._data[k] self._key_locks.pop(k, None) def lock_for(self, key: str) -> threading.Lock: with self._lock: if key not in self._key_locks: self._key_locks[key] = threading.Lock() return self._key_locks[key] def get(self, key: str): with self._lock: return self._data.get(key) def put(self, key: str, state: dict): with self._lock: self._data[key] = state if key not in self._key_locks: self._key_locks[key] = threading.Lock() if len(self._data) > self._max_keys: self._evict_locked() def drop(self, key: str): with self._lock: self._data.pop(key, None) self._key_locks.pop(key, None) def count(self) -> int: with self._lock: return len(self._data) _store = _StateStore() ### STATE SCHEMA def _new_state(rid: str) -> dict: now = time.time() return { "_meta": {"request_id": rid, "created_at": now, "version": _VERSION}, "request": { "model_id": None, "model_name": None, "base_model_id": None, "owned_by": None, "function_calling": None, "features": {}, "interface": None, "chat_id": None, "message_id": None, "session_id": None, "tool_ids": [], "builtin_tools_config": None, "vision_capable": False, "params": {}, }, "system_prompt": {"detected": False, "length": 0, "preview": ""}, "conversation": { "depth": 0, "user_msgs": 0, "assistant_msgs": 0, "system_msgs": 0, "tool_msgs": 0, }, "attachments": {"files": [], "images": 0}, "tools": { "resolved": [], "calls": [], "rounds": 0, "total_calls": 0, "classifications": {}, }, "rag": {"detected": False, "source_count": 0}, "timeline": [], "stream": { "chunks": 0, "content_chunks": 0, "empty_chunks": 0, "first_at": None, "last_at": None, "finish_reason": None, "active": True, "rounds": 0, "round_chunks": 0, }, "reasoning": { "detected": False, "tag_based": False, "delta_based": False, "blocks": 0, "total_chars": 0, "in_block": False, "block_chars": 0, "block_start": None, "durations": [], }, "responses_api": {"detected": False, "events": [], "items": 0}, "response": { "chars": 0, "words": 0, "code_blocks": 0, "code_langs": [], "headers": 0, "lists": 0, "tables": 0, "citations": 0, "has_math": False, "paragraphs": 0, }, "timing": { "inlet_at": now, "first_token_at": None, "first_content_at": None, "outlet_at": None, "ttft_ms": None, "ttfc_ms": None, "stream_ms": None, "total_ms": None, }, "errors": [], "_ctl": {"last_status_at": 0.0, "last_status_txt": "", "panel_built": False}, } ### SMALL HELPERS def _tl(s, ev, label, detail="", dur=None): tl = s["timeline"] if len(tl) >= _MAX_TIMELINE: return e = {"t": time.time(), "ev": ev, "l": label} if detail: e["d"] = detail if dur is not None: e["ms"] = round(dur, 1) tl.append(e) def _classify(name): if name in _ALL_BUILTIN_TOOL_NAMES: for cat, ns in _BUILTIN_TOOLS_BY_CATEGORY.items(): if name in ns: return f"builtin:{cat}" return "builtin:other" return "terminal" if name in _TERMINAL_TOOL_NAMES else "custom" def _rid(body, md=None): cid = (md or {}).get("chat_id", "") or "" mid = (md or {}).get("user_message_id", "") or "" if cid and mid: model = body.get("model", "") return f"{cid}:{mid}:{model}" model = body.get("model", "") msgs = body.get("messages", []) um = [m for m in msgs if m.get("role") == "user"] txt = um[-1].get("content", "")[:200] if um else "" return f"fb:{hashlib.md5(f'{model}:{txt}'.encode()).hexdigest()[:12]}" def _fd(ms): if ms is None: return "N/A" return f"{ms:.0f}ms" if ms < 1000 else f"{ms / 1000:.2f}s" def _safe(fn, default=None): """Run fn, return default on any exception.""" try: return fn() except Exception: return default async def _emit_status(s, emitter, desc, done=False, force=False): if not emitter: return now = time.time() ctl = s["_ctl"] if not done and not force: if ( desc == ctl["last_status_txt"] or now - ctl["last_status_at"] < _STATUS_THROTTLE_SECS ): return try: await emitter( { "type": "status", "data": { "description": f"🔍 {desc}", "done": done, "hidden": False, }, } ) ctl["last_status_at"] = now ctl["last_status_txt"] = desc except Exception: pass ### DETECTION — REASONING def _proc_reasoning(s, event): r = s["reasoning"] choices = event.get("choices") or [] if not choices: return delta = choices[0].get("delta") or {} # Delta-based (reasoning_content field) rc = delta.get("reasoning_content") if rc is not None: if not r["detected"]: r.update( detected=True, delta_based=True, blocks=max(r["blocks"], 1), block_start=time.time(), in_block=True, ) _tl(s, "reas", "Reasoning started (delta)") r["total_chars"] += len(rc) r["block_chars"] += len(rc) return content = delta.get("content") # End delta-based block when content appears if content is not None and r["in_block"] and r["delta_based"]: _end_reas(s) # Tag-based detection in content if content: if not r["in_block"] and _REASONING_OPEN_RE.search(content): r.update( detected=True, tag_based=True, in_block=True, blocks=r["blocks"] + 1, block_start=time.time(), block_chars=0, ) _tl(s, "reas", f"Reasoning block #{r['blocks']}") if r["in_block"]: r["total_chars"] += len(content) r["block_chars"] += len(content) if r["in_block"] and _REASONING_CLOSE_RE.search(content): _end_reas(s) def _end_reas(s): r = s["reasoning"] if r["block_start"]: d = (time.time() - r["block_start"]) * 1000 r["durations"].append(round(d, 1)) _tl( s, "reas_end", f"Reasoning #{r['blocks']} ended", detail=f"{r['block_chars']}ch", dur=d, ) r.update(in_block=False, block_chars=0, block_start=None) ### DETECTION — RESPONSES API def _proc_resp_api(s, event): t = event.get("type", "") if not t.startswith("response."): return False ra = s["responses_api"] ra["detected"] = True if t == "response.output_item.added": ra["items"] += 1 _tl(s, "resp_api", f"Output: {event.get('item', {}).get('type', '?')}") if len(ra["events"]) < 50: ra["events"].append({"type": t, "t": time.time()}) return True ### DETECTION — STREAM TOOL CALL EXTRACTION def _proc_tool_calls(s, event): choices = event.get("choices") or [] if not choices: return tcs = (choices[0].get("delta") or {}).get("tool_calls") or [] for tc in tcs: name = (tc.get("function") or {}).get("name") if name: cat = _classify(name) s["tools"]["calls"].append( { "name": name, "cat": cat, "round": s["stream"]["rounds"], "t": time.time(), } ) s["tools"]["total_calls"] += 1 s["tools"]["classifications"][cat] = ( s["tools"]["classifications"].get(cat, 0) + 1 ) _tl(s, "tool", f"Tool: {name}", detail=cat) ### RESPONSE ANALYSIS (outlet) def _analyze(content): if not content: return { "chars": 0, "words": 0, "code_blocks": 0, "code_langs": [], "headers": 0, "lists": 0, "tables": 0, "citations": 0, "has_math": False, "paragraphs": 0, } c = content si = c.find(_PANEL_START) if si >= 0: ei = c.find(_PANEL_END) c = c[:si] + (c[ei + len(_PANEL_END) :] if ei >= 0 else "") c = c.strip() cm = re.findall(r"```(\w*)\n", c, re.MULTILINE) return { "chars": len(c), "words": len(c.split()), "code_blocks": len(cm), "code_langs": sorted(set(l for l in cm if l)), "headers": len(re.findall(r"^#{1,6}\s+", c, re.MULTILINE)), "lists": len(re.findall(r"^[\s]*[-*]\s+|^[\s]*\d+\.\s+", c, re.MULTILINE)), "tables": 1 if len(re.findall(r"^\|.+\|", c, re.MULTILINE)) >= 3 else 0, "citations": len(re.findall(r"\[\d+\]|\[\[.*?\]\]|", c)), "has_math": bool(re.search(r"\$\$?[^$]+\$\$?", c)), "paragraphs": len([p for p in c.split("\n\n") if p.strip()]), } _TC_HTML_RE = re.compile( r']*>.*?(.*?).*?
(.*?)
.*?', re.DOTALL | re.IGNORECASE, ) def _extract_html_tools(content): out = [] for m in _TC_HTML_RE.finditer(content): summary = m.group(1).strip() try: d = json.loads(html_mod.unescape(m.group(2).strip())) name = d.get("name", summary) if isinstance(d, dict) else summary except Exception: name = summary out.append({"name": name, "cat": _classify(name), "src": "html"}) return out ### STREAM STATUS DESCRIPTION def _stream_status(s): r = s["reasoning"] st = s["stream"] if r["in_block"]: return f"Thinking... ({r['block_chars']:,}ch)" tc = s["tools"]["calls"] if tc and time.time() - tc[-1].get("t", 0) < 3: return f"Tool: {tc[-1]['name']}" if st["content_chunks"] > 0: el = time.time() - (st["first_at"] or s["timing"]["inlet_at"]) rate = st["content_chunks"] / el if el > 0 else 0 return f"Streaming {st['content_chunks']}ch ({rate:.0f}/s)" return f"Waiting... ({_fd((time.time() - s['timing']['inlet_at']) * 1000)})" ### PANEL STRIP / MESSAGE FIND def _strip(content): if _PANEL_START not in content: return content si = content.find(_PANEL_START) ei = content.find(_PANEL_END) return content[:si].rstrip() + (content[ei + len(_PANEL_END) :] if ei >= 0 else "") def _find_assistant(messages): for m in reversed(messages): if m.get("role") == "assistant" and isinstance(m.get("content"), str): return m return None ### MARKDOWN PANEL BUILDERS def _compact(s): p = [] model = s["request"]["model_name"] or s["request"]["model_id"] or "?" p.append(f"**{model}**") t = s["timing"] if t["ttft_ms"] is not None: p.append(f"TTFT {_fd(t['ttft_ms'])}") if t["total_ms"] is not None: p.append(f"total {_fd(t['total_ms'])}") ch = s["stream"]["chunks"] if ch: p.append(f"{ch}ch") c = s["response"]["chars"] if c: p.append(f"{c:,}c") tc = s["tools"]["total_calls"] if tc: p.append(f"{tc} tools") if s["reasoning"]["detected"]: p.append(f"reasoning:{s['reasoning']['blocks']}") if s["errors"]: p.append(f"{len(s['errors'])} errors") return " · ".join(p) def _verbose(s, timeline_limit=20): L = [] def _sec(title): L.append("") L.append(f"**{title}**") rq = s["request"] _sec("Request") L.append( f"- Model: `{rq['model_id']}`" + ( f" ({rq['model_name']})" if rq["model_name"] and rq["model_name"] != rq["model_id"] else "" ) ) if rq["base_model_id"]: L.append(f"- Base: `{rq['base_model_id']}`") if rq["function_calling"]: L.append(f"- FC: `{rq['function_calling']}`") feats = [k for k, v in rq["features"].items() if v] if feats: L.append(f"- Features: {', '.join(feats)}") if rq["interface"]: L.append(f"- Interface: `{rq['interface']}`") if rq["vision_capable"]: L.append("- Vision: Yes") if rq["params"]: ps = ", ".join(f"{k}={v}" for k, v in list(rq["params"].items())[:6]) L.append(f"- Params: {ps}") sp = s["system_prompt"] if sp["detected"]: _sec("System Prompt") L.append( f"- {sp['length']:,} chars" + (f" · `{sp['preview']}`" if sp["preview"] else "") ) cv = s["conversation"] _sec("Conversation") L.append( f"- {cv['depth']} msgs (user:{cv['user_msgs']} asst:{cv['assistant_msgs']}" + (f" tool:{cv['tool_msgs']}" if cv["tool_msgs"] else "") + ")" ) att = s["attachments"] if att["files"] or att["images"]: _sec("Attachments") for f in att["files"][:5]: L.append(f"- `{f['name']}`") if len(att["files"]) > 5: L.append(f"- +{len(att['files']) - 5} more") if att["images"]: L.append(f"- {att['images']} image(s)") tl = s["tools"] if tl["total_calls"] or tl["resolved"]: _sec("Tools") if tl["resolved"]: L.append( f"- Available: {', '.join(f'`{t}`' for t in tl['resolved'][:8])}" + (f" +{len(tl['resolved']) - 8}" if len(tl["resolved"]) > 8 else "") ) if tl["total_calls"]: L.append(f"- {tl['total_calls']} call(s), {max(tl['rounds'], 1)} round(s)") for c in tl["calls"][:8]: L.append(f" - `{c['name']}` [{c['cat']}]") if len(tl["calls"]) > 8: L.append(f" - +{len(tl['calls']) - 8} more") if s["rag"]["detected"]: _sec("RAG") L.append(f"- {s['rag']['source_count']} source(s) detected") rs = s["reasoning"] if rs["detected"]: _sec("Reasoning") meth = "tag" if rs["tag_based"] else "delta" L.append(f"- {meth}-based · {rs['blocks']} block(s) · {rs['total_chars']:,}ch") if rs["durations"]: L.append(f"- Time: {_fd(sum(rs['durations']))}") ra = s["responses_api"] if ra["detected"]: _sec("Responses API") L.append(f"- {ra['items']} items, {len(ra['events'])} events") st = s["stream"] _sec("Stream") if st["active"]: L.append( f"- {st['chunks']}ch (content:{st['content_chunks']} empty:{st['empty_chunks']})" ) if st["rounds"]: L.append(f"- {st['rounds']} round(s)") else: L.append("- Non-streaming") if st["finish_reason"]: L.append(f"- Finish: `{st['finish_reason']}`") rp = s["response"] if rp["chars"]: _sec("Response") L.append(f"- {rp['chars']:,}c / {rp['words']:,}w / {rp['paragraphs']}p") parts = [] if rp["code_blocks"]: parts.append( f"{rp['code_blocks']} code blocks" + (f" ({','.join(rp['code_langs'])})" if rp["code_langs"] else "") ) if rp["headers"]: parts.append(f"{rp['headers']} headers") if rp["lists"]: parts.append(f"{rp['lists']} list items") if rp["tables"]: parts.append(f"{rp['tables']} tables") if rp["citations"]: parts.append(f"{rp['citations']} citations") if rp["has_math"]: parts.append("math detected") if parts: L.append(f"- {' · '.join(parts)}") tm = s["timing"] _sec("Timing") if tm["ttft_ms"] is not None: L.append(f"- TTFT: {_fd(tm['ttft_ms'])}") if tm["ttfc_ms"] is not None and tm["ttfc_ms"] != tm["ttft_ms"]: L.append(f"- TTFC: {_fd(tm['ttfc_ms'])}") if tm["stream_ms"] is not None: L.append(f"- Stream: {_fd(tm['stream_ms'])}") if tm["total_ms"] is not None: L.append(f"- Total: {_fd(tm['total_ms'])}") if s["errors"]: _sec("Errors") for e in s["errors"][:5]: L.append(f"- {e}") ev = s["timeline"] if ev: _sec("Timeline") base = ev[0]["t"] for e in ev[:timeline_limit]: off = (e["t"] - base) * 1000 det = f" — {e['d']}" if e.get("d") else "" dur = f" ({_fd(e['ms'])})" if e.get("ms") else "" L.append(f"- +{_fd(off)}: {e['l']}{det}{dur}") if len(ev) > timeline_limit: L.append(f"- +{len(ev) - timeline_limit} more") return "\n".join(L) def _json_export(s): x = copy.deepcopy(s) x.pop("_ctl", None) try: return json.dumps(x, indent=2, default=str) except Exception: return '{"error":"serialization_failed"}' def _panel(s, verbose=False, show_json=True, timeline_limit=20): c = _compact(s) tag = " open" if verbose else "" lines = [] lines.append("") lines.append("") lines.append(_PANEL_START) lines.append("") lines.append(f"") lines.append(f"🔍 LLMTrace v{_VERSION} — {c}") lines.append("") lines.append(_verbose(s, timeline_limit=timeline_limit)) lines.append("") if show_json: lines.append("
") lines.append("📋 JSON Export") lines.append("") lines.append(f"```json\n{_json_export(s)}\n```") lines.append("") lines.append("
") lines.append("") lines.append("") lines.append(_PANEL_END) return "\n".join(lines) ### DASHBOARD (HTML) def _dash_json(s): x = copy.deepcopy(s) x.pop("_ctl", None) try: return json.dumps(x, default=str, ensure_ascii=False) except Exception: return '{"error":"serialization_failed"}' def _full_dashboard(s): dj = _dash_json(s) dj = dj.replace(" LLMTrace - {mn}

LLMTrace Dashboard v{_VERSION}

{mn}{td}

Timeline

Legend

TTFTTime to first token from LLM
TTFCTime to first content (excl. reasoning)
chStream chunks (SSE events received)
cCharacters in response text
wWords in response text
pParagraphs (double-newline separated)
hMarkdown headers (# lines)
liList items (bullets or numbered)
tblTables detected
codeFenced code blocks (with language)
citeCitations or source references
FCFunction calling mode
RoundsTool call round-trips with LLM

Raw Diagnostics



LLMTrace v{_VERSION} · FAI-Solutions Open WebUI Extensions Hub · 

"""


def _inline_embed(s, initial_rows=12, expand_step=12):
    tl = s["timeline"]
    tm = s["timing"]
    mn = html_mod.escape(s["request"]["model_name"] or s["request"]["model_id"] or "?")
    stats = [f"{mn}"]
    if tm["ttft_ms"] is not None:
        stats.append(f'TTFT {_fd(tm["ttft_ms"])}')
    if tm["total_ms"] is not None:
        stats.append(_fd(tm["total_ms"]))
    if s["stream"]["chunks"]:
        stats.append(f'{s["stream"]["chunks"]}ch')
    if s["response"]["chars"]:
        stats.append(f'{s["response"]["chars"]:,}c')
    if s["tools"]["total_calls"]:
        stats.append(f'🛠️{s["tools"]["total_calls"]}')
    if s["reasoning"]["detected"]:
        stats.append(f'🧠{s["reasoning"]["blocks"]}')
    bar = " · ".join(f'{x}' for x in stats)

    rows = ""
    base_t = tl[0]["t"] if tl else s["_meta"]["created_at"]
    for idx, e in enumerate(tl):
        off = (e["t"] - base_t) * 1000
        cls = "d"
        if e["ev"] in ("inlet", "outlet"):
            cls = e["ev"]
        elif "reas" in e["ev"]:
            cls = "rs"
        elif "tool" in e["ev"]:
            cls = "tl"
        elif any(k in e["ev"] for k in ("strm", "chunk", "round", "stream")):
            cls = "st"
        elif "err" in e["ev"]:
            cls = "er"
        det = f' — {html_mod.escape(e.get("d", ""))}' if e.get("d") else ""
        dur = f' ({_fd(e["ms"])})' if e.get("ms") else ""
        hidden = ' style="display:none"' if idx >= initial_rows else ""
        rows += f'
+{_fd(off)} {html_mod.escape(e["l"])}{det}{dur}
\n'
    if len(tl) > initial_rows:
        rows += f'
Show more (+{len(tl)-initial_rows})
'

    return f"""

🔍 LLMTrace v{_VERSION}


{bar}


{rows}


"""


def _exec_js(s):
    html = _full_dashboard(s)
    b64 = base64.b64encode(html.encode("utf-8")).decode("ascii")
    return f"""(function(){{try{{var h=atob("{b64}");var b=new Blob([h],{{type:"text/html;charset=utf-8"}});var u=URL.createObjectURL(b);var w=window.open(u,"_blank");if(!w){{var a=document.createElement("a");a.href=u;a.target="_blank";document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();a.remove()}}setTimeout(function(){{URL.revokeObjectURL(u)}},5000)}}catch(e){{console.error("LLMTrace:",e)}}}})();"""


### USER SETTINGS


def _upref(user, attr, admin_val):
    if user and isinstance(user, dict):
        uv = user.get("valves")
        if uv is not None:
            v = getattr(uv, attr, None)
            if v is not None:
                return v
    return admin_val


### FILTER CLASS


class Filter:
    class Valves(BaseModel):
        priority: int = Field(
            default=100, description="Execution order. Higher = later."
        )
        enabled: bool = Field(default=True, description="Enable/disable LLMTrace.")
        show_for_api: bool = Field(
            default=False, description="Show panel for API requests."
        )
        emit_status: bool = Field(
            default=True, description="Real-time progress during streaming."
        )
        verbose_default: bool = Field(
            default=False, description="Default to expanded panel."
        )
        sys_preview_len: int = Field(
            default=80, description="System prompt preview length."
        )
        dashboard_mode: str = Field(
            default="panel+embed",
            description="Default: panel | panel+embed | panel+tab | all",
            json_schema_extra={"enum": ["panel", "panel+embed", "panel+tab", "all"]},
        )
        panel_timeline_limit: int = Field(
            default=20, description="Max timeline events shown in markdown panel."
        )
        embed_initial_rows: int = Field(
            default=12, description="Timeline rows visible in embed before expansion."
        )
        embed_expand_step: int = Field(
            default=12, description="Rows added per 'Show more' click in embed."
        )

    class UserValves(BaseModel):
        verbose: Optional[bool] = Field(
            default=None, description="Override verbose mode. None = admin default."
        )
        show_json: bool = Field(
            default=True, description="Include JSON export in panel."
        )
        dashboard_mode: Optional[str] = Field(
            default=None,
            description="Override: panel | panel+embed | panel+tab | all",
            json_schema_extra={"enum": ["panel", "panel+embed", "panel+tab", "all"]},
        )

    def __init__(self):
        # All persistent state is in the module-level _store.
        self.valves = self.Valves()
        self.toggle = True
        self.icon = "data:image/svg+xml;base64,"

    ### INLET
    async def inlet(
        self,
        body: dict,
        __user__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __metadata__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __model__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __event_emitter__=None,
        __task__: Optional[str] = None,
        __task_body__: Optional[dict] = None,
    ) -> dict:
        log.debug(
            f"LLMTrace inlet called | task={__task__} enabled={self.valves.enabled}"
        )
        if (__task__ and __task__ in _SKIP_TASKS) or __task_body__ is not None:
            return body
        if not self.valves.enabled:
            return body

        md = __metadata__ or {}
        is_webui = bool(md.get("chat_id"))
        if not is_webui and not self.valves.show_for_api:
            return body

        rid = _rid(body, md)
        s = _new_state(rid)

        try:
            rq = s["request"]
            rq["interface"] = "open-webui" if is_webui else "api"
            rq["chat_id"] = md.get("chat_id")
            rq["message_id"] = md.get("user_message_id")
            rq["session_id"] = md.get("session_id")
            rq["model_id"] = body.get("model")
            rq["features"] = md.get("features") or {}
            rq["tool_ids"] = md.get("tool_ids") or []
            s["tools"]["resolved"] = list(rq["tool_ids"])

            fc = md.get("function_calling")
            if fc:
                rq["function_calling"] = fc

            if __model__:
                rq["model_name"] = __model__.get("name")
                rq["owned_by"] = __model__.get("owned_by")
                info = __model__.get("info") or {}
                params = info.get("params") or {}
                rq["base_model_id"] = info.get("base_model_id")
                if not fc:
                    rq["function_calling"] = params.get("function_calling")
                rq["params"] = {
                    k: v for k, v in params.items() if k != "system" and v is not None
                }
                meta = info.get("meta") or {}
                rq["vision_capable"] = (meta.get("capabilities") or {}).get(
                    "vision", False
                )
                rq["builtin_tools_config"] = meta.get("builtinTools")

            # System prompt
            sys_txt = ""
            if __model__:
                sys_txt = ((__model__.get("info") or {}).get("params") or {}).get(
                    "system", ""
                ) or ""
            if not sys_txt:
                for m in body.get("messages", []):
                    if m.get("role") == "system":
                        sys_txt = m.get("content", "")
                        break
            if sys_txt:
                pl = self.valves.sys_preview_len
                s["system_prompt"] = {
                    "detected": True,
                    "length": len(sys_txt),
                    "preview": (
                        sys_txt[:pl] + "..." if len(sys_txt) > pl else sys_txt
                    ).replace("\n", " "),
                }

            # Conversation
            for m in body.get("messages", []):
                if m.get("role") == "assistant" and isinstance(m.get("content"), str):
                    m["content"] = _strip(m["content"])
            msgs = body.get("messages", [])
            cv = s["conversation"]
            cv["depth"] = len(msgs)
            for m in msgs:
                r = m.get("role", "")
                if r == "user":
                    cv["user_msgs"] += 1
                elif r == "assistant":
                    cv["assistant_msgs"] += 1
                elif r == "system":
                    cv["system_msgs"] += 1
                elif r == "tool":
                    cv["tool_msgs"] += 1

            # Attachments
            for f in md.get("files") or []:
                s["attachments"]["files"].append(
                    {
                        "name": f.get("name") or f.get("filename") or "?",
                        "size": f.get("size", 0),
                    }
                )
            for m in msgs:
                c = m.get("content")
                if isinstance(c, list):
                    s["attachments"]["images"] += sum(
                        1
                        for p in c
                        if isinstance(p, dict) and p.get("type") == "image_url"
                    )
            if md.get("files"):
                s["rag"]["detected"] = True

            # Streaming
            s["stream"]["active"] = body.get("stream", True)
            _tl(s, "inlet", "Inlet", detail=f"model={rq['model_id']}")
        except Exception as e:
            s["errors"].append(f"inlet_analysis: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")
            log.debug(f"LLMTrace inlet error: {e}")

        _store.put(rid, s)

        if "metadata" not in body:
            body["metadata"] = {}
        body["metadata"]["_ts_rid"] = rid

        md = __metadata__ or {}
        md["_ts_rid"] = rid
        log.debug(f"LLMTrace inlet STORED rid={rid} | store_count={_store.count()}")

        if self.valves.emit_status and __event_emitter__:
            await _emit_status(s, __event_emitter__, "Processing...", force=True)

        return body

    ### STREAM
    async def stream(
        self,
        event: dict,
        __metadata__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __event_emitter__=None,
        __task__: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> dict:
        if __task__ and __task__ in _SKIP_TASKS:
            return event
        if not self.valves.enabled:
            return event

        rid = (__metadata__ or {}).get("_ts_rid")
        if not rid:
            log.debug(
                f"LLMTrace stream SKIP: no rid in metadata | keys={list((__metadata__ or {}).keys())[:10]}"
            )
            return event

        s = _store.get(rid)
        if not s:
            log.debug(
                f"LLMTrace stream SKIP: rid={rid} not found in store | store_count={_store.count()}"
            )
            return event

        lk = _store.lock_for(rid)
        with lk:
            try:
                now = time.time()
                st = s["stream"]
                st["chunks"] += 1
                st["round_chunks"] += 1

                if st["first_at"] is None:
                    st["first_at"] = now
                    s["timing"]["first_token_at"] = now
                    s["timing"]["ttft_ms"] = (now - s["timing"]["inlet_at"]) * 1000
                    _tl(
                        s,
                        "first_chunk",
                        "First chunk",
                        detail=f"TTFT={_fd(s['timing']['ttft_ms'])}",
                    )

                st["last_at"] = now
                _proc_resp_api(s, event)

                choices = event.get("choices") or []
                if choices:
                    delta = choices[0].get("delta") or {}
                    content = delta.get("content")
                    fr = choices[0].get("finish_reason")

                    if content:
                        st["content_chunks"] += 1
                        if (
                            s["timing"]["first_content_at"] is None
                            and not s["reasoning"]["in_block"]
                        ):
                            s["timing"]["first_content_at"] = now
                            s["timing"]["ttfc_ms"] = (
                                now - s["timing"]["inlet_at"]
                            ) * 1000
                    elif content is not None:
                        st["empty_chunks"] += 1

                    if fr:
                        st["finish_reason"] = fr
                        if fr == "tool_calls":
                            st["rounds"] += 1
                            _tl(
                                s,
                                "round_end",
                                f"Round {st['rounds']}",
                                detail=f"{st['round_chunks']}ch",
                            )
                            st["round_chunks"] = 0
                        elif fr == "stop":
                            _tl(s, "stream_end", "Stream ended")

                    _proc_reasoning(s, event)
                    _proc_tool_calls(s, event)
            except Exception as e:
                s["errors"].append(f"stream: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")

        # Status
        if self.valves.emit_status and __event_emitter__:
            try:
                await _emit_status(s, __event_emitter__, _stream_status(s))
            except Exception:
                pass

        return event

    ### OUTLET
    async def outlet(
        self,
        body: dict,
        __user__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __metadata__: Optional[dict] = None,
        __event_emitter__=None,
        __task__: Optional[str] = None,
    ) -> dict:
        log.debug(
            f"LLMTrace outlet called | task={__task__} enabled={self.valves.enabled}"
        )
        if __task__ and __task__ in _SKIP_TASKS:
            return body
        if not self.valves.enabled:
            return body

        rid = (__metadata__ or {}).get("_ts_rid") or body.get("metadata", {}).get(
            "_ts_rid"
        )
        if not rid:
            log.debug(
                f"LLMTrace outlet SKIP: no rid | meta_keys={list((__metadata__ or {}).keys())[:10]} | body_meta_keys={list(body.get('metadata', {}).keys())[:10]}"
            )
            return body

        s = _store.get(rid)
        if not s:
            log.debug(
                f"LLMTrace outlet SKIP: rid={rid} not in store | store_count={_store.count()}"
            )
            return body

        if s["_ctl"]["panel_built"]:
            return body

        lk = _store.lock_for(rid)
        asst = None
        with lk:
            try:
                now = time.time()
                s["timing"]["outlet_at"] = now
                s["timing"]["total_ms"] = (now - s["timing"]["inlet_at"]) * 1000
                if s["stream"]["first_at"] and s["stream"]["last_at"]:
                    s["timing"]["stream_ms"] = (
                        s["stream"]["last_at"] - s["stream"]["first_at"]
                    ) * 1000

                # Handle non-streaming: stream was never called
                if not s["stream"]["active"] or s["stream"]["chunks"] == 0:
                    s["stream"]["active"] = False
                    if s["timing"]["ttft_ms"] is None:
                        # Estimate TTFT as total time for non-streaming
                        s["timing"]["ttft_ms"] = s["timing"]["total_ms"]
                        _tl(s, "non_stream", "Non-streaming response")

                # Close any open reasoning block
                if s["reasoning"]["in_block"]:
                    _end_reas(s)

                _tl(s, "outlet", "Outlet")

                messages = body.get("messages") or []
                asst = _find_assistant(messages)

                if not asst:
                    log.debug(
                        f"LLMTrace outlet: NO assistant message found | msg_count={len(messages)} | roles={[m.get('role') for m in messages[-3:]]}"
                    )

                if asst:
                    content = asst.get("content", "") or ""
                    clean = _strip(content)
                    s["response"] = _analyze(clean)

                    html_tc = _extract_html_tools(content)
                    existing = {c["name"] for c in s["tools"]["calls"]}
                    for ht in html_tc:
                        if ht["name"] not in existing:
                            s["tools"]["calls"].append(ht)
                            s["tools"]["total_calls"] += 1

                    tm_count = sum(1 for m in messages if m.get("role") == "tool")
                    if tm_count:
                        s["tools"]["rounds"] = max(
                            s["tools"]["rounds"], s["stream"]["rounds"], 1
                        )

                    for m in messages:
                        srcs = m.get("sources")
                        if srcs and isinstance(srcs, list):
                            s["rag"]["detected"] = True
                            s["rag"]["source_count"] += len(srcs)

                    # User preferences: UserValves > admin Valves
                    verbose = _upref(__user__, "verbose", self.valves.verbose_default)
                    show_json = _upref(__user__, "show_json", True)
                    dm = _upref(__user__, "dashboard_mode", self.valves.dashboard_mode)

                    # Build panel
                    panel_text = _panel(
                        s,
                        verbose=verbose,
                        show_json=show_json,
                        timeline_limit=self.valves.panel_timeline_limit,
                    )
                    asst["content"] = clean + panel_text
                    s["_ctl"]["panel_built"] = True
                    log.debug(
                        f"LLMTrace PANEL BUILT | rid={rid} | content_len={len(asst['content'])} | dm={dm}"
                    )
                    s["_ctl"]["_dm"] = dm  # stash for use outside lock

            except Exception as e:
                s["errors"].append(f"outlet: {type(e).__name__}: {e}")
                log.debug(f"LLMTrace outlet error: {traceback.format_exc()}")

        # Dashboard deliverables
        if __event_emitter__ and asst and s["_ctl"].get("panel_built"):
            dm = s["_ctl"].get("_dm", "panel")

            if dm in ("panel+embed", "all"):
                try:
                    await __event_emitter__(
                        {
                            "type": "embeds",
                            "data": {
                                "embeds": [
                                    _inline_embed(
                                        s,
                                        initial_rows=self.valves.embed_initial_rows,
                                        expand_step=self.valves.embed_expand_step,
                                    )
                                ]
                            },
                        }
                    )
                except Exception as e:
                    log.debug(f"LLMTrace embed error: {e}")

            if dm in ("panel+tab", "all"):
                try:
                    await __event_emitter__(
                        {"type": "execute", "data": {"code": _exec_js(s)}}
                    )
                except Exception as e:
                    log.debug(f"LLMTrace dashboard error: {e}")

            if self.valves.emit_status:
                try:
                    await _emit_status(
                        s,
                        __event_emitter__,
                        f"Complete — {_fd(s['timing']['total_ms'])}",
                        done=True,
                        force=True,
                    )
                except Exception:
                    pass

        return body

meta.description: Visualizes the complete LLM workflow step by step, from the input prompt to the final response.

manifest.title: LLMTrace
manifest.author: Johannes Faber
manifest.description: Visualizes the full LLM workflow step-by-step. Tracks model info,
